fields.title: Use shorter nano-id for memory entries
fields.description:
Change memory entry IDs from 21-char nanoid to 12-char for better UX.

Current: itoVz1h0QCl_78gmCgjPG (21 chars)
Target: ~12 chars (e.g., itoVz1h0QCl_7)

Still collision-safe for thousands of entries, much more readable in /memories output and when referencing by id.
fields.close_reason: Done: Changed nano-id from 21 chars to 12 chars for better UX
